text.tspan: The assembly line for VCF Operations content. Plain English in. Working content out. At scale.
name: "[VCF Content Factory] VM CPU Sustained High"
each agent owns one lane — never crosses into another
Suite API push to a running
fork it · diff it · PR it · share it
three lanes off the line · pick any · all repeatable
"I will build a motor car for the great multitude." · This is that — for VCF Operations content.
interchangeable parts · one specialist per station · no broken units leave the line · every batch identical, every order custom
